achievement: Penetrated hundreds of li beyond main army, killed/captured 2,028 enemies including Xiongnu ministers, killed Jiruo Hou Chan (grandfather of Shanyu), captured uncle Luogubi
result: Enfeoffed as Champion Marquis (冠军侯) with 1,600 households

year: Yuan Shou Year 2 Spring (元狩二年春)
achievement: Crossed Wuli, traversed five kingdoms, fought for six days, passed Yanzhi Mountain by 1,000+ li, killed Zhelan King and Luhu King, captured Hunye Prince and ministers, 8,000+ enemies, seized Jintian Golden Man

year: Yuan Shou Year 2 Summer (元狩二年夏)
route: From Beidi (北地), via Juyan to Qilian Mountain
achievement: Captured Qiutu King, 2,500 surrenderers, killed/captured 30,200 enemies, captured 5 kings, 59 royal family members, 63 officials

year: Yuan Shou Year 2 Autumn (元狩二年秋)
achievement: Accepted surrender of Hunye King with tens of thousands; killed 8,000 who tried to flee
result: Granted additional 1,700 households; reduced garrison troops in Longxi, Beidi, Shangjun by half

route: From Dai Commandery and You Beiping
achievement: Killed/captured 70,443 enemies, captured Tun Tou King, Han King and others, 83 officials; performed Feng sacrifice at Langjuxu Mountain, Li sacrifice at Guyan, viewed Hanhai
result: Granted additional 5,800 households; total enfeoffment 15,100 households
